flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Dawson Community College fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 (308 → 189).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dawson Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $5.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dawson Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $9.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Dawson Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (37.9% vs 46.1%).
